غریبیم.meaning: my estrangement; my being a stranger

نورزم.meaning: I do not practice; I do not bear

نرود.meaning: it does not go; it does not pass

غمزه.meaning: a flirtatious wink or playful glance

کاسیر.meaning: a captive or someone held in bondage

بردمد.meaning: it brings forth or takes away
